records.surface: Deploy and open a sample Cloud Run container
records.outcome: Create a project with billing, deploy the Cloud Run sample container, and open its public service URL to see the container's response.

records.surface: Your First Render Deploy, Dashboard Web Service
records.outcome: The developer's Web Service deploy is Live and serves its root content from the assigned onrender.com URL.

records.surface: Create a standalone AWS account and complete console orientation
records.outcome: The developer reaches the documented Congratulations conclusion after locating the console's core controls and widgets.

records.surface: Azure developer tools via VS Code for the Web + azd up
records.outcome: azd up finishes; deployed to-do app URL loads.

records.surface: Code Engine Hello World in the IBM Cloud console
records.outcome: Code Engine builds and deploys the sample application and serves its public endpoint.

records.surface: Create an OCI Free Trial tenancy and connect to the first Linux instance
records.outcome: The developer is connected to the default shell for the instance.

records.surface: Workers CLI edited Hello Worker deployment
records.outcome: The public workers.dev endpoint returns Hello Worker!.

records.surface: Dashboard Git deployment
records.outcome: Vercel builds the imported repository and serves a production deployment URL.

records.surface: Getting Started on Heroku with Node.js sample deploy
records.outcome: The Node.js sample is running on a Heroku dyno and loads at its herokuapp.com URL.

records.surface: Developer Sandbox learning path
records.outcome: OpenShift deploys the learning-path application and exposes it through a route.

records.surface: Elastic Cloud trial to first Elasticsearch Console search
records.outcome: The expected book appears under hits.hits with its original _source JSON.

records.surface: Create and configure an Atlas cluster with Atlas CLI
records.outcome: The CLI prints the connection command and the documented cluster-created terminal signal.

records.surface: Hosted Supabase project + cURL Data API leaderboard
records.outcome: cURL GET /rest/v1/leaderboard returns JSON rows ordered by score.

records.surface: Start with Neon, 1 - Basics
records.outcome: A Neon project contains sample data, a development branch is modified and compared with production, then the development branch is reset so the two schemas are identical again.

records.surface: PlanetScale Postgres dashboard quickstart
records.outcome: A PlanetScale Postgres database with a main branch is provisioned, and the developer has generated and recorded a default role plus a usable connection string.

records.surface: Snowflake trial + Snowsight load data into a table
records.outcome: Snowsight finishes Load and displays the number of rows successfully inserted into the table.

records.surface: Databricks notebook: query sample data and save visualization
records.outcome: Notebook queries samples.nyctaxi.trips and saves a bar visualization.

records.surface: Confluent Cloud Console quick start: cluster, topic, and message
records.outcome: A message produced to a Cloud topic is visible when consuming or viewing messages from that topic.

records.surface: Redis Cloud quick start
records.outcome: A free Redis Cloud database is active and has been opened through one of the quick start's documented connection methods.

records.surface: CockroachDB Cloud Standard trial + cockroach sql first queries
records.outcome: cockroach sql connects to the Standard cluster and executes SQL successfully.

records.surface: OpenAI Responses API via cURL (API key + funded credits)
records.outcome: An authenticated HTTPS Responses API request to https://api.openai.com/v1/responses returns model-generated output text.

records.surface: Get started with Exa via cURL Search
records.outcome: An authenticated cURL POST to https://api.exa.ai/search returns search results JSON.

records.surface: LangChain Python Quickstart, basic agent
records.outcome: A LangChain agent using a selected chat model, weather function, and system prompt is invoked with the San Francisco weather question and prints its final content blocks after calling the tool.

records.surface: Arize AX Instrument your agent, manual Python path
records.outcome: A request through the developer's instrumented app produces a trace visible in the selected Arize AX project, with its span tree, model, prompt, response, latency, and token counts.

records.surface: Get started with Claude
records.outcome: The developer has sent the quickstart's renewable-energy prompt to the Claude Messages API and received Claude's assistant message.

records.surface: Mistral Developer API via cURL chat completions (Studio Free mode)
records.outcome: An authenticated cURL POST to https://api.mistral.ai/v1/chat/completions returns chat-completion model output.

records.surface: Inference Providers chat completions via cURL (HF token + monthly credits)
records.outcome: An authenticated cURL POST to https://router.huggingface.co/v1/chat/completions returns model message JSON.

records.surface: HTTP predictions API via cURL (API token + prepaid credit)
records.outcome: An authenticated cURL POST to https://api.replicate.com/v1/predictions with Prefer: wait returns a prediction whose status is successful and whose output field is populated.

records.surface: Cohere Chat API v2 via cURL (trial API key)
records.outcome: An authenticated cURL POST to https://api.cohere.ai/v2/chat returns an assistant message for the prompt.

records.surface: Integrated embedding index via cURL (API key + Starter plan)
records.outcome: After cURL create-for-model and upsert text, a cURL search with text against the index host returns result.hits.

records.surface: Zoom General App creation build flow
records.outcome: An authenticated Zoom REST API response returns the current user's profile JSON from GET https://api.zoom.us/v2/users/me.

records.surface: Send and receive a first Twilio SMS with Python and Virtual Phone
records.outcome: The expected SMS text is visible as a received message.

records.surface: Slack CLI with Bolt for Python quickstart
records.outcome: The starter Bolt app runs locally, is installed into a development workspace, and responds to a `hello` message and button click in Slack.

records.surface: X API pay-per-use Getting Access + cURL first user lookup
records.outcome: GET https://api.x.com/2/users/by/username/xdevelopers with Bearer Token returns the user object.

records.surface: Building your first Discord Bot
records.outcome: A configured and installed Discord bot receives interactions through a public endpoint, runs the /challenge game across two users, and posts the calculated result to the original channel.

records.surface: Send an SMS request with the Messages API
records.outcome: The response is `Accepted` and includes `message_uuid`.

records.surface: Node.js SDK first transactional email
records.outcome: After common key and domain setup, the developer uses a selected Resend quickstart to send a transactional email and receives that route's success response.

records.surface: Daily room via cURL REST API then Prebuilt room URL
records.outcome: POST /rooms returns a room url and opening that URL loads the Daily Prebuilt call UI.

records.surface: Stream videos in five minutes via cURL create asset
records.outcome: Mux accepts the authenticated cURL request and creates a video asset from the supplied input URL.

records.surface: React Chat connected client with tutorial credentials
records.outcome: The developer first chooses a Stream product and implementation route, then completes that route's distinct observable success.

records.surface: Create an Okta Integrator Free Plan org and complete an Angular SPA redirect sign-in
records.outcome: The Profile view displays the user's name and the signed-in controls include Sign out.

records.surface: Tailscale browser-led quickstart
records.outcome: A new tailnet contains two authenticated devices, both are visible in onboarding, and the developer reaches the Tailscale admin console.

records.surface: Vanilla JavaScript SPA login with manual Dashboard setup
records.outcome: After account and tenant creation, the developer chooses an application architecture and framework, completes its Auth0 setup, and verifies that route's first authentication or authorization behavior.

records.surface: Register and run an ASP.NET Core web app with Microsoft sign-in
records.outcome: The user is redirected back to the app after sign-in without an Entra error.

records.surface: Use the Clerk CLI to scaffold Next.js and create the first signed-in user
records.outcome: The profile icon is visible in place of Sign in and Sign up.

records.surface: AuthKit AI Installer on a supported existing project
records.outcome: The developer chooses a WorkOS product and route, configures the staging environment and credentials required by that route, executes its first workflow, and verifies the product-specific result.

records.surface: Developer quick start, Docker and Go path
records.outcome: A local Go program stores the password value in Vault's version 2 key-value engine, retrieves it, confirms the value, and prints Access granted!.

records.surface: Snyk web app: account + first SCM/project scan
records.outcome: Imported/scanned project shows issues/remediation in web UI.

records.surface: Mount and read a local .env file from a 1Password Environment
records.outcome: After local app and CLI setup and creation of a 1Password Environment, the developer either reads mounted project secrets after biometric approval or completes an SSH and Git workflow with a 1Password-held key and device authentication.

records.surface: Keycloak Docker getting-started through SPA Sign in
records.outcome: Sign in on keycloak.org/app succeeds against local server.

records.surface: Stripe-hosted Checkout via cURL Checkout Session
records.outcome: A cURL-created Checkout Session opens on Stripe's hosted page and completes a test-mode payment.

records.surface: Plaid Postman Collection sandbox API exploration
records.outcome: Configured Postman Collection returns successful Sandbox API JSON.

records.surface: PayPal REST API get-started path through first authenticated sandbox API response
records.outcome: PayPal's sandbox REST API accepts the bearer access token and returns an HTTP success response for GET /v1/invoicing/invoices.

records.surface: Square Get Started, browser-based Sandbox payment path
records.outcome: A Square developer application creates a completed Sandbox payment through API Explorer, exposes its request and response in API Logs, and shows the transaction in the Sandbox Square Dashboard.

records.surface: Adyen online payments, Web Drop-in, Sessions flow, test environment
records.outcome: The developer creates an Adyen test account and credentials, implements Web Drop-in using the Sessions flow, submits a documented test card payment, shows the authorized result to the shopper, and receives the matching AUTHORISATION webhook with success true.

records.surface: Hello World Java sandbox charge
records.outcome: The Java sample sends an authCaptureTransaction to the Authorize.net sandbox and receives a successful transaction response.

records.surface: Scaffold an app, React Router recommended path
records.outcome: A React Router Shopify app is scaffolded, connected to the Dev Dashboard, served through a local tunnel, installed on a dev store, opened in Shopify admin, and reaches the documented Generate a product action.

records.surface: QuickBooks Online Accounting API CompanyInfo call through the OAuth 2.0 Playground
records.outcome: The developer creates the required QuickBooks Online developer resources, uses the OAuth 2.0 Playground to obtain a temporary access token and sandbox realm ID, sends the documented GET CompanyInfo request, and receives a CompanyInfo object for the sandbox company.

records.surface: Create and verify a first EVM API Key Wallet account with Node TypeScript
records.outcome: The terminal displays the Created EVM account label and a 0x-prefixed address.

records.surface: Wise Business personal API token + cURL GET /v1/profiles
records.outcome: Wise accepts a Business personal API token and returns the authenticated account's profiles from GET /v1/profiles.

records.surface: Salesforce REST API Quick Start using Developer Edition, Salesforce CLI, and cURL
records.outcome: The developer authenticates a free Salesforce Developer Edition org with Salesforce CLI, walks through the documented REST discovery and Account queries, patches one Account's BillingCity to Fremont, receives HTTP 204, and sees the changed value in Salesforce.

records.surface: Latest developer-platform Quickstart through local app-card preview
records.outcome: The boilerplate app is built, deployed, installed, assigned to the default contact record view, served from local development, and visibly rendered on a contact.

records.surface: Forge CLI: Jira hello-world issue panel
records.outcome: Installed Forge app panel visible on a Jira issue.

records.surface: Australia REST API Explorer tutorial, create and read an incident
records.outcome: The developer opens REST API Explorer, sends a Table API v1 POST that creates an incident, captures the Location header's sys_id, sends the documented GET for that sys_id, and receives the inserted record.

records.surface: SAP BTP Trial account to Service Marketplace
records.outcome: Trial subaccount cockpit is open and Service Marketplace lists available services.

records.surface: Dynamics 365 Business Central AL HelloWorld get-started
records.outcome: The generated HelloWorld extension compiles, publishes, and runs in the opened Business Central online sandbox session.

records.surface: Experience Platform API auth tutorial + cURL XDM classes credential test
records.outcome: An authenticated cURL request to the global XDM classes endpoint returns a successful response.

records.surface: Invite an Enterprise Developer Site user and connect App Builder to a Workday Development tenant
records.outcome: The connection indicator is green.

records.surface: Box Quick Start developer token and Get Current User via cURL
records.outcome: After free developer signup, email confirmation, and Generate Developer Token on the pre-built application, an authenticated GET /users/me returns the logged-in console user.

records.surface: Data Integration Source to Target Flow quick start
records.outcome: The developer creates reusable source and target connections, configures and saves a Source to Target Flow, runs it manually, and sees a successful run in the Activity panel.

records.surface: Konnect quickstart: proxy the first request with cURL
records.outcome: A cURL request to the Konnect gateway route is forwarded to the configured upstream service.

records.surface: CodeRabbit hosted Quickstart: connect Git provider and first PR review
records.outcome: Connected repos yield actionable AI review feedback on an opened PR.

records.surface: Hello World web tutorial
records.outcome: A README change created on a branch is merged into the main branch through a pull request.

records.surface: Tutorial: Make your first Git commit
records.outcome: Create a GitLab project, clone it over SSH, edit README.md on a branch, commit and push the change, merge it into the default branch, push, and verify the content and commit in GitLab.

records.surface: Postman desktop quick start with Postman Echo
records.outcome: The Postman desktop app sends a GET request to Postman Echo, displays the server response, saves the request in a new collection, runs a `Status code is 200` post-response test, and shows the test result.

records.surface: Docker Hub PAT + Hub API JWT auth + list repositories (cURL)
records.outcome: Docker Hub exchanges a username and PAT for a JWT, then returns the authenticated user's repository list.

records.surface: Get Started - Docker: provision an nginx container with Terraform
records.outcome: Install and verify Terraform, define a Docker provider, nginx image, and container, initialize and validate the configuration, approve terraform apply, and verify nginx at localhost:8000.

records.surface: Pulumi Cloud + AWS get started: first pulumi up
records.outcome: Pulumi creates the getting-started AWS resource and records a successful stack update in Pulumi Cloud.

records.surface: CircleCI Cloud Quickstart, GitHub App Create Project route
records.outcome: CircleCI has created a project linked to the selected GitHub repository, committed or accepted a CircleCI configuration, triggered the first run, and displayed it as passing.

records.surface: Getting started with Pipelines stage 1: Starter example build
records.outcome: The Buildkite Starter example pipeline runs and its build completes successfully.

records.surface: LaunchDarkly software-developer quickstart, SDK not selected
records.outcome: In a selected SDK branch, an application initializes LaunchDarkly, evaluates a first flag for a context, and changes its visible behavior when the flag is turned on and off.

records.surface: Express error monitoring for Node.js
records.outcome: An exception from the instrumented Express application is sent to Sentry and becomes an issue.

records.surface: Linux host Agent reporting via Fleet Automation
records.outcome: Obtain Datadog organization access, select the correct Datadog site and Linux host platform, use Fleet Automation's in-app generated script to install and configure Agent 7, then verify an Agent metric with host and version metadata.

records.surface: Send Linux host metrics to a Grafana Cloud dashboard
records.outcome: Recent metrics for the named host are visible in the dashboard.

records.surface: New Relic Event API custom event via cURL
records.outcome: Compressed cURL POST to the Event API returns HTTP 200 with a uuid acknowledgment.

records.surface: Ruby OpenTelemetry traces to a first Honeycomb trace view
records.outcome: Choose US or EU, create a Honeycomb account and team, copy an ingest API key, instrument and run a Ruby service with OpenTelemetry, generate request traffic, query HEATMAP(duration_ms), and open one trace.

records.surface: PostHog Cloud Capture API via cURL
records.outcome: PostHog accepts an event sent with the project token and associates it with a distinct ID.

records.surface: Trial Account Onboarding
records.outcome: A new PagerDuty trial tenant exists with its first service, tested notification methods, the mobile-app step completed, optional schedule and integration choices resolved, and the onboarding flow has redirected the developer into the PagerDuty account.

records.surface: Automate: run your first Cypress test (Kitchen Sink) on a public URL
records.outcome: Obtain BrowserStack credentials, install the Cypress CLI, clone and configure the Kitchen Sink sample for the public app, execute it on BrowserStack, and inspect its cloud build and logs.

records.surface: Sauce Labs Live Cross Browser desktop test
records.outcome: Live desktop session launches and is interactive.

records.surface: Writing your first Django app, part 1
records.outcome: A locally running Django 6.0 development server routes /polls/ to the tutorial's index view.

records.surface: Spring Quickstart Guide: Hello World endpoint
records.outcome: Generate a Spring Web project, add the documented /hello controller, run it with the generated Gradle wrapper, and receive Hello World from embedded Tomcat on localhost:8080.

records.surface: Official First Steps Hello World API
records.outcome: A locally running FastAPI development server returns the documented Hello World JSON object for a GET request to `/`.

records.surface: Set up and test drive Flutter
records.outcome: The generated Flutter counter app runs in Chrome, retains its current counter state across a source edit, and uses the edited decrement behavior after stateful hot reload.

records.surface: Recommended React Native framework path: Expo tutorial, Create your first app
records.outcome: Create the StickerSmash Expo and React Native project, reset it to the tutorial baseline, run it on mobile and web, edit app/index.tsx with React Native core components and styles, and see the saved change applied to the running apps.

records.surface: Create and verify the beginner iOS SwiftUI Chat Prototype
records.outcome: The live preview renders both exact messages as padded rounded bubbles, yellow first and teal second, matching the `hello-swiftui--second-bubble-modifiers-ContentView.swift` reference.

records.surface: Create your first Android app
records.outcome: Android Studio has built a Greeting Card Compose app whose Preview shows a personalized introduction with a selected background color and 24.dp padding.

records.surface: Unity Manual: Create your first project, using the Get Started with Unity learning template
records.outcome: Create a Unity ID with a default organization and eligible subscription, install and sign in to Unity Hub, activate a license, install Unity Editor 6.1 or later, select the Get Started with Unity learning template, name and locate a project, and create it so it appears in the Projects list and opens in the Unity Editor.

records.surface: Arduino Cloud Application API via API key (hosted)
records.outcome: Arduino Cloud accepts the application credentials and returns an access token for hosted API use.

records.surface: Canva Apps SDK Quickstart CLI hello_world preview
records.outcome: The hello_world app preview opens in Canva and the example button responds with Hello world.

records.surface: Sunshine Platform: 10-minute Ticketing API quick start

records.surface: Render and interact with a Mapbox GL JS map using the CDN route
records.outcome: The map visibly responds to drag and zoom input.

records.surface: Launch hellofly demo app with flyctl
records.outcome: hellofly demo is deployed and https://<app>.fly.dev/ loads via fly apps open.

records.surface: Search REST API via cURL: save an object, then search
records.outcome: An authenticated REST write stores an object and a search request returns that object as a hit.

records.surface: Building X Accounts API sandbox, first UserGroups response
records.outcome: The portal gets a developer to product and API selection, but each Siemens product defines its own access model and result. A complete Building X Accounts API sandbox candidate reaches a successful `GET me/usergroups` response listing the UserGroups accessible to the machine user.

records.surface: Deploy a DigitalOcean sample directly from its template repository
records.outcome: App Platform has automatically deployed the selected starter application and exposed it at the URL shown on the app Overview page.

records.surface: Publish an existing folder through logged-in Netlify Drop
records.outcome: Netlify has deployed the dropped project and the live site is available at its unique netlify.app URL.

records.surface: Fork and deploy Railway's prepared NextJS app from GitHub
records.outcome: Railway has built the forked NextJS source, started its container, and marked the deployment Active on the Project Canvas with a reachable public URL.

records.surface: Create a project and deploy local code with the Upsun CLI
records.outcome: Upsun has accepted the committed configuration, built and deployed the application to the default production environment, and allows requests to the application's primary environment URL.

records.surface: Qovery Console production path: cloud cluster + first application
records.outcome: After cluster creation, a first application deploy completes and the app is reachable via the Qovery-provided URL/endpoint.

records.surface: Create a Distribution-based Linode in Cloud Manager and connect over SSH
records.outcome: Akamai Cloud has provisioned and fully booted the first Linode, and the developer has connected to its Linux shell through SSH or the built-in Lish console.

records.outcome: Vultr has provisioned the developer's first Cloud Compute instance, and the developer can open its Linux shell and verify the logged-in user.

records.outcome: Scaleway has created the developer's first Linux CPU Instance, and the developer has authenticated as root through SSH with the uploaded Project key.

records.outcome: OVHcloud reports the first Linux Public Cloud instance Enabled, and the developer has logged in through SSH as the image's preconfigured sudo user.

records.outcome: ssh root@ip authenticates to new server.

records.outcome: A Helios Free Shared Edition workspace executes a SQL query in the hosted Cloud Portal SQL Editor.

records.outcome: The developer completes one simulated Razorpay transaction using the product route selected for the business.

records.surface: Account-level admin API key with cURL
records.outcome: The developer receives a sandbox bearer access token from the Authentication API.

records.surface: GoCardless Getting Started through the first test payment authorisation
records.outcome: The developer creates and completes a sandbox Billing Request, then sees the resulting customer in the GoCardless dashboard.

records.surface: Dwolla Sandbox Quickstart cURL token + Root
records.outcome: GET api-sandbox Root with Bearer token returns _links.account.href.

records.surface: Explicit Create sandbox, signed-in widgets, and simulation cURL
records.outcome: The developer simulates the documented $10 VISA authorization in the public sandbox and can view that card transaction in Transaction Timeline.

records.surface: Paddle.js overlay checkout quickstart (sandbox test payment)
records.outcome: A Paddle.js overlay checkout opens in sandbox and completes a test payment for a configured price.

records.surface: Skip optional AI population and use the Node SDK
records.outcome: The test-site API response contains the created active subscription, its customer, the charged test card, and the generated paid invoice.

records.surface: Asana REST API Quick start guide with a personal access token
records.outcome: The intended terminal is an authenticated sequence that creates `Sample task`, retrieves it, renames it to `Modified task`, deletes it, and reaches the guide's readiness statement.

records.surface: Notion API quickstart: PAT + cURL create page
records.outcome: POST /v1/pages creates a private page from markdown.

records.surface: Airtable Web API list records via cURL with a personal access token
records.outcome: GET list-records with Bearer PAT returns JSON records array.

records.surface: monday platform API first GraphQL request with a personal token
records.outcome: The intended terminal is a token-authenticated POST to `https://api.monday.com/v2` containing one of the guide's board queries.

records.surface: Developer Hub app + Access Token + POST /contacts
records.outcome: An authenticated POST /contacts request creates an Intercom contact and returns the contact object.

records.surface: Freshworks developer account + FDK create/run first app
records.outcome: fdk run product test URL shows app in intended product location.

records.surface: Self Client client-credentials access token via cURL
records.outcome: Zoho validates the Self Client credentials and returns an OAuth access token.

records.surface: Pipedrive API token + cURL GET /api/v2/deals
records.outcome: GET https://{companydomain}.pipedrive.com/api/v2/deals?api_token=... returns HTTP 200 with success true.

records.surface: Docusign eSignature REST API main Node.js Quickstart first run
records.outcome: The intended first success is the preconfigured main Node.js Quickstart running locally, authenticating with Authorization Code Grant, and opening its embedded-signing code example.

records.surface: Dropbox generated access token + cURL files/list_folder
records.outcome: Authenticated cURL POST to /2/files/list_folder returns folder listing JSON for the authorized account.

records.surface: IntelliJ Platform Plugin SDK first local plugin run
records.outcome: The wizard-generated Gradle plugin project starts the target IntelliJ Platform IDE in a standalone development instance with the plugin loaded.

records.surface: JFrog Platform Cloud trial Docker hello-world push
records.outcome: docker push succeeds and hello-world appears in the Cloud Docker repository Artifacts tree.

records.surface: Nexus Repository Community Edition first hosted Raw component upload
records.outcome: A file is stored as a component in a newly created Raw hosted repository, and Nexus Repository redirects the user to search results for the uploaded component path.

records.surface: Harness CI first Cloud build pipeline
records.outcome: A Cloud CI build for a selected Git branch executes the configured Run step containing `echo "Harness CI is fast"`.

records.surface: Spacelift Quick Start through the first stack run
records.outcome: The first Spacelift stack run finishes and its run view shows the result.

records.surface: Python virtual-environment Hello World
records.outcome: In the Python candidate, the developer runs the published requests-based program inside a virtual environment and sees `Hello, world!` on standard output.

records.surface: K3s Quick-Start Guide: single-node cluster
records.outcome: K3s install completes; kubectl shows Ready node.

records.surface: NVIDIA NIM API Catalog hosted quickstart (Developer Program API key + Python)
records.outcome: An authenticated request using the API Catalog key returns chat-completions model output from a hosted NIM (API Catalog quickstart example: meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct) via POST https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions.

records.surface: ArcGIS Location Platform API key and JavaScript Display a map
records.outcome: In the JavaScript candidate, the CodePen application displays the topographic basemap for the Santa Monica Mountains and allows pan and zoom.

records.surface: Swagger Studio email signup and first published API
records.outcome: The candidate's sample OpenAPI 3.0 definition is published and its public Swagger Studio URL can be copied and shared.

records.surface: Go SDK on macOS with local Hello World
records.outcome: In the Go candidate, the local Worker processes the Workflow and Activity, the starter prints `Workflow result: Hello Temporal`, and the execution is visible in the local Web UI.

records.surface: Prefect Open Source local first flow
records.outcome: In the Open Source candidate, the quickstart flow runs locally and the terminal provides a link to the execution graph in the local Prefect UI.

records.surface: Dagster OSS quickstart first local ETL pipeline
records.outcome: The official local project materializes its `processed_data` ETL asset and writes the transformed sample rows, including the new `age_group` column, to `processed_data.csv`.

records.surface: Airbyte Cloud Sample Data source to first successful sync
records.outcome: An Airbyte Cloud connection completes a successful sync from Sample Data into a configured destination.

records.surface: Fivetran free account trial first initial connection sync
records.outcome: Fivetran has connected a selected source to a selected destination and completed the connection's initial data sync.

records.surface: Local Mac Jaffle Shop DuckDB build
records.outcome: dbt Core seeds the sample DuckDB database, creates the Jaffle Shop view and table models, runs the data tests, and completes all 28 nodes without warnings, errors, or skips in the guide's demonstrated terminal.

records.surface: Astro trial + first DAG via GitHub Actions
records.outcome: example_astronauts is deployed to the Astro Deployment and a DAG run is visible in the Airflow UI.

records.surface: Camunda 8 local Rocket Launch first BPMN process
records.outcome: The supplied Rocket Launch BPMN process runs locally to successful completion with the documented `Odyssey` mission and `fuelLevel` of 95.

records.surface: Celonis APIs with Bearer auth via cURL
records.outcome: HTTPS call to team base path with Bearer returns success.

records.surface: Studio Web: create project and run first workflow
records.outcome: Studio Web project cloud run completes successfully.

records.surface: Splunk Cloud Search Tutorial with uploaded tutorial data
records.outcome: Splunk Cloud indexes the tutorial file and a Search query returns its events.

records.surface: Dynatrace Playground sample-data exploration
records.outcome: The developer opens the Dynatrace Playground and interacts with a live dashboard or notebook backed by sample data.

records.surface: Business email activation to Kickstart sample dashboard
records.outcome: A newly activated trial user sees preloaded Kickstart sample data and an application, business, or security dashboard without configuring a collector or ingesting real data.

records.surface: Account setup + Send-Your-Data key + REST /logs/v1/singles via cURL
records.outcome: An authenticated POST to the region ingress /logs/v1/singles endpoint is accepted and the submitted log is visible in Coralogix (Explore, Livetail, or dashboard).

records.surface: Uptime dashboard: first HTTP monitor
records.outcome: A hosted HTTP monitor checks the supplied URL and reports its current status.

records.surface: Chronosphere developer metrics query with Query Builder
records.outcome: The developer selects an available Prometheus metric and runs a query in Metrics Explorer.

records.surface: Browser JS Quick Start snippet + first occurrence
records.outcome: The Browser JavaScript quick-start snippet reports a test occurrence to the new Rollbar project.

records.surface: Dashboard quickstart: first API check
records.outcome: A saved API check sends its request and passes its assertions.

records.surface: Rootly quick start from signup through a first Slack test incident
records.outcome: A test incident is created in Rootly's web app and the browser redirects to its incident page.

records.surface: Slack signup, app installation, and first live incident
records.outcome: A first live incident has been declared and incident.io has created its dedicated Slack incident channel and posted the default heads-up in the main incidents channel.

records.surface: REST API
records.outcome: Developer obtains valid app credentials, authenticates, and successfully calls a RingCentral API endpoint

records.surface: SDK integration
records.outcome: SDK integration completed and data flow established

records.surface: Quick start guide: workspace, email channel, test person, first campaign email
records.outcome: A Customer.io campaign sends its message to the test person and the email arrives in the test inbox.

records.surface: Knock Dashboard and API
records.outcome: Developer sends a notification through a triggered workflow that delivers a message to specified recipients.

records.surface: Quickstart: sandbox domain cURL send first email
records.outcome: Mailgun accepts the sandbox-domain cURL request and delivers the first email to an authorized recipient.

records.surface: Dashboard and SDK
records.outcome: Message sent and received by at least one user subscription

records.surface: REST API and official SDKs
records.outcome: Developer sends a test transactional email that is accepted by Postmark and visible in the Postmark UI or confirmed by API response

records.surface: SendGrid v3 Web API
records.outcome: Developer sends a valid email message through the SendGrid API and receives a successful response.

records.surface: Pusher Channels JavaScript Client
records.outcome: Developer successfully receives and handles a real-time event in their web application using Pusher Channels.

records.surface: JavaScript SDK
records.outcome: Developer can publish a message to a channel and receive it in real-time via subscription.

records.surface: REST API with SDKs and CLI
records.outcome: A notification message is successfully sent using the API key and appears as delivered in the Courier dashboard logs.

records.surface: Bird Channels API send SMS via HTTPS (AccessKey)
records.outcome: POST to the Channels messages endpoint accepts an SMS body and returns an accepted message object.

records.surface: REST API
records.outcome: Developer sends a valid SMS message through Infobip API and receives a successful response

records.surface: Koyeb Web Console
records.outcome: Developer runs code in a Koyeb sandbox and observes expected output, confirming environment setup and execution capability.

records.outcome: First application or service is deployed and accessible through Coolify with automatic SSL and domain configuration optionally set

records.surface: Web Console and SDKs
records.outcome: Developer has a backend project with a database collection ready to be used by their app

records.surface: Novu Framework Express.js Quickstart
records.outcome: Notification workflow triggered and notification sent to subscriber

records.surface: Encore CLI and local development environment
records.outcome: Developer runs the app locally and successfully calls the API endpoint, receiving the expected JSON response
